tests.failure_reason: Requires a pre-generated export file (dashboard_000000.png) not present in this environment. The test must be run on a machine with the full dataset after running --export-live-dashboard. Path differs only by worktree root.
Expects total_runs > 0 from an in-memory experiment database. No experiment runs recorded in this environment; total_runs=0 on both commits. Messages byte-for-byte identical.

conclusion_detail: Both failures are PRE_EXISTING_IDENTICAL_FAILURE. Assertion messages are identical on base commit 3c2226d and current commit 27ad5cb (test_live_dashboard differs only in absolute worktree path). Commit 27ad5cb introduced no new test failures.
